findings.claim: RESOLVED (PR #9, was MREL-001 BLOCKER): universe file failures previously crashed raw; now edge-validated, single fixture-invalid record before any network request.

RESOLVED (PR #9, was MREL-002/MRES-001 CRITICAL): pre-existing snapshot dir and mid-write OSError previously escaped uncaught; now snapshot-exists / storage-failure records with staged cleanup and no partials.
RESOLVED (PR #9, was MRISK-001/MRISK-002): pagination now capped at MAX_PAGES=64 mapping to malformed-response; publication race collapses to snapshot-exists/storage-failure, never raw OSError.

MREL-003 reclassified info: argparse usage errors for missing/invalid --as-of write usage text to stderr with exit 2; the delta spec does not impose the machine-readable-record contract on argument parsing, only on fetch failures.
OPEN follow-up (was MRES-002): orphaned staging directories can accumulate after SIGKILL/power loss between mkdtemp and rename; no startup sweep reclaims them.
OPEN follow-up (was MREAD-001): OHLC price-relationship validator duplicated across alpaca_market_data.py and fixtures_json.py instead of one shared rule.

OPEN follow-ups (was MREAD-004/005): inline __import__ idiom and scattered in-function imports in the adapter test module; MREAD-002 (retry magic numbers) and MREAD-003 (raw universe parsing) were resolved by PR #9.
